summary: Polish Courier app first-iteration end-to-end testing. Backend: 14/14 pytest tests passed including real Gemini 2.5-flash manifest parsing of a synthetic reportlab-generated Polish PDF (3 stops with addresses, recipients, package numbers, COD amounts). Frontend: all critical UI flows verified on mobile viewport (390x844) — home renders 'Moje Trasy' + upload-manifest-btn + route card, route screen lists 3 stop-rows with COD badges and total '239.50 PLN pobrania', stop screen shows Nawiguj/Dostarczono/Nieobecny with correct Polish labels, absent screen correctly toggles between send-sms-btn (when phone present) and 'Oznacz jako nieobecny' fallback (when no phone) with Polish SMS preview text. Stop state machine (deliver / absent / reset) verified via API with persistence GET checks. No deprecated Expo packages (expo-av/expo-barcode-scanner/expo-background-fetch) detected.

minor.issue: Uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') in server.py:312. FastAPI recommends lifespan context manager. Non-blocking.

issues: React Native console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' — appears from styles in index.tsx, route/[id]/index.tsx (shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset). Migrate to boxShadow on web or accept the warning. Non-blocking.

action_items: Optional: migrate FastAPI startup/shutdown handler to lifespan API to remove DeprecationWarning.
Optional: replace shadow* StyleSheet props with boxShadow to silence RN web deprecation warnings on home/route screens.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is well-structured and uses async motor properly; ObjectId is correctly excluded via projection {'_id': 0}.
Heavy fields (photo_base64/signature_base64) are stripped from list/detail responses — good.
Frontend correctly reads EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (required prefix for Expo runtime env exposure); all API calls go through /api prefix.
All interactive elements have testID attributes (upload-manifest-btn, route-card-{id}, stop-row-{id}, navigate-btn, mark-delivered-btn, mark-absent-btn, send-sms-btn, back-to-route-btn, back-btn).
Polish UI labels render correctly with diacritics (ą,ć,ę,ł,ó,ś,ź,ż).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_courier_api.py (created with 14 pytest tests, includes reportlab PDF synth)
seed_data_creation: Seeded one route via real /api/manifest/upload using reportlab-generated Polish PDF (3 stops: Kraków no-phone COD 89.50, Warszawa Marszałkowska phone COD 150.00, Warszawa Puławska phone COD 0). Route id 32ee7b77-dcd5-4e72-83ae-278a48f88f95 still in MongoDB at end of UI run. Pytest session-fixture seeds and cleans up its own route to avoid pollution.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_courier_api.py for regression — generates its own PDF and consumes one Gemini call per session. For UI: route id 32ee7b77-dcd5-4e72-83ae-278a48f88f95 currently exists in DB (TEST_TRASA_UI) and can be reused, or seed a fresh route by reusing _make_polish_manifest_pdf() helper. Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL) per Expo convention.
